value.found_quote: Remote MCP servers can be used to connect models over the Internet to new data sources and capabilities. In this guide, we'll cover how to build a remote MCP server that reads data from a private data source (a vector store) and makes it available in ChatGPT as a data-only app (formerly called a connector) for chat, deep research, and company knowledge
value.rationale: The page explicitly confirms that remote MCP servers can be registered as apps (formerly called connectors) in ChatGPT for chat, deep research, and company knowledge. It also notes a terminology update as of December 17, 2025, where "connectors" were renamed to "apps," with existing functionality remaining intact. The page describes this as a current, generally available feature with detailed setup instructions.
